clean_room.note: Acceptance audit consumes GLASS artifacts and user-generated PixInsight/WBPP black-box timing/output metadata only.

source_provenance.note: geometric_warp_coverage is accumulated by the resident CUDA warp path before sigma rejection. finite_pre_rejection_coverage remains coverage + low/high rejection counts for rejection accounting.

summary.semantics: Resident CUDA provenance summarizes post-rejection coverage, rejection counts, and optional geometric warp coverage from resident output maps.

output_map_policy.description: audit writes all available diagnostic maps; science writes master, weight, coverage, and DQ maps; minimal writes only master.

source_provenance.note: geometric_warp_coverage is accumulated by the resident CUDA warp path before sigma rejection. finite_pre_rejection_coverage remains coverage + low/high rejection counts for rejection accounting.

summary.semantics: Resident CUDA provenance summarizes post-rejection coverage, rejection counts, and optional geometric warp coverage from resident output maps.

exception_context.note: Exception frames explain active-frame count drift; timing priorities remain based on wall-clock stages.

stage_timing_rows.note: Cumulative worker-thread read/decode time. Use light_read_upload_calibrate and light_read_wait_wall for wall-clock performance gating.
Cumulative worker-thread FITS materialize/decode time. It may exceed wall-clock stage time when prefetch overlaps with GPU work, so it is informational.
Cumulative worker-thread FITS open time. It may exceed wall-clock stage time when prefetch overlaps with GPU work, so it is informational.

targets.label: I/O + upload + calibration overlap
targets.next_action: Use deeper double/multi buffering, pinned host rings, async H2D, and larger batches so GPU calibration overlaps CPU FITS decode and disk reads.

targets.label: Output-map write policy
targets.next_action: Use science/minimal map policies for speed runs and keep full audit maps for validation runs.

targets.label: Resident registration/warp batching
targets.next_action: Keep star tables, descriptors, candidate scoring, pixel refinement, and warp scheduling resident on the GPU; reduce per-frame Python orchestration and host/device synchronization.

targets.label: Resident master-frame cache
targets.next_action: Reuse the shared resident master cache when calibration inputs and policies are unchanged.

items.note: Cumulative worker-thread FITS open time. It may exceed wall-clock stage time when prefetch overlaps with GPU work, so it is informational.
Cumulative worker-thread read/decode time. Use light_read_upload_calibrate and light_read_wait_wall for wall-clock performance gating.
Cumulative worker-thread FITS materialize/decode time. It may exceed wall-clock stage time when prefetch overlaps with GPU work, so it is informational.

resident_io_pipeline.calibration_h2d_release_policy: auto enables h2d_event only when wave_effective_frames equals stream_count; callback_queue is an explicit native multi-wave experiment

clean_room.note: This summary uses GLASS artifacts and user-generated PixInsight/WBPP black-box timing/output metadata only. It does not use PixInsight/WBPP implementation source.

glass.resident_device: NVIDIA RTX PRO 6000 Blackwell Workstation Edition

wbpp_blackbox.clean_room_note: Black-box execution only; official WBPP.js source content was not read.
